subject: Automating patient follow-ups at Tampa Dental Studio
body:
Hi,

I came across Tampa Dental Studio and noticed you offer a great range of services. One thing many dental practices struggle with is getting patients back for their 6-month checkups.

We build automated recall systems that send personalized reminders via text and email at the right intervals. Practices we work with see a 25% increase in recall appointments without any extra work from the front desk.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
